claim_boundary: This is prefix evidence only; it does not satisfy G005 or any full-corpus paper-target win.
diagnosis: Compact luma-window CNN video encoder improves keyboard over flat luma-window projection (0.02019 vs 0.01578) while preserving no-button FPR 0.0.
It is still below the earlier compact-frame factorized prefix keyboard result (~0.0239) and recovers no mouse-button true positives.

Next branch needs either larger prefix/full-corpus scaling with the best video encoder or a recipe-aligned button-event objective (e.g. separate down/up token denoising with recall-constrained calibration) before a 4xH200 G005 launch.
next_action: Implement a button-event recall-focused typed masked-diffusion head/calibration or run a larger-prefix CNN scaling probe only if it improves button recall on prefix; do not checkpoint G005.
